info.title: Client Profiling
info.description: Creation and management of client profiles

get.description:
Redirects to the currently activated risk profile for a given owner constellation,
corresponding to the selected tags.
If no active risk profile exists, returns 404.

parameters.name: ownerId
parameters.description: Person ids of the owners that are to be represented by this client profile

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The locale of the language the resource should return for language selection (default: en)

303.description: Redirect to the current active risk profile

304.description: The risk profile did not change since the provided If-Modified-Since header

404.description: Signifies that no currently activated risk profile exists for this owner constellation.

500.description: Internal Server Error with detailed error description

post.description:
Creates a new risk profile for a given owner constellation, corresponding to the requested tags.
This risk profile is not activated and intended for filling in. For filling in and activation of
this risk profile use its provided location from the HAL self-link or from the HTTP Location
header. Answers in the risk profile are already provided as far as possible if the 'createEmpty' 
query param is set to false (default), based on the
currently activated risk profile.
If there is already an activated risk profile for the given ownerId, 
it will be used to select the correct questionnaire (if no other tag was provided) 
and provide the owner’s previous answers.

parameters.name: ownerId
parameters.description: Person ids of the owners that are to be represented by this client profile

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The locale of the language the resource should return for language selection (default: en)

parameters.name: createEmpty
parameters.description:
Controls creation mode.
- false: If a NEW entity exists it is returned. Otherwise a NEW entity is created with answers copied from the ACTIVE set. If no ACTIVE set exist, then the answer is copied from the most recently ARCHIVED set.
- true (default): If a NEW entity exists it is returned. Otherwise NEW entity is created without any answers from ACTIVE or ARCHIVE set.

parameters.name: underage
parameters.description: Enable handling for underage account holders.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description:
Tags used identify the correct risk profile questionnaire.
This parameter is mandatory if the questionnaire can not be determined from the activated risk profile.

200.description: The new risk profile for editing.

Last-Modified.description: The 'Last-Modified' header contains the last modification time for returned risk profile for the given page in RFC2616 format.  Example: Fri, 27 Sep 2019 11:00:00 GMT

400.description: No questionnaire found for the provided set of tags.

500.description: Internal Server Error with detailed error description

get.summary: Returns the risk profile by id
get.description:
Returns the risk profile with the corresponding id. If it is not yet activated, it can be updated
using the `fillRiskProfile` API.

parameters.name: detailed
parameters.description: Enables the provision of consultant documentation.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The locale of the language the resource should return for language selection (default: en)

200.description: Returns the riskprofile, including scoring and errors.

304.description: The risk profile did not change since the provided If-Modified-Since header

404.description: The risk profile with the provided id was not found.

500.description: Internal Server Error with detailed error description

put.description:
Updates the answers and justifications of the questionnaire. The action taken is based on the
validationMode parameter (if given).

parameters.name: detailed
parameters.description: Enables the provision of consultant documentation.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The locale of the language the resource should return for language selection (default: en)

parameters.name: If-Unmodified-Since
parameters.description:
The timestamp of the last know change to the entity, provided by the backend as Last-Modified 
header. The user of the endpoint indicates which version of the entity he is working with in order
for the system to be able to determine, whether the user has to update the entity prior to 
manipulating it.

parameters.name: validationMode
parameters.description:
What action to take in the API:
- `VALIDATE`: Update the questionnaire and validate the answers. Mark problems and
   inconsistencies with error messages in the response. Unanswered questions will not
   trigger errors. This mode is meant to be used for the initial answering of a questionnaire,
   before the user tries to activate it.
- `VALIDATE_FULL`: Update the questionnaire and validate the answers. All problems and
   inconsistencies will be reported as errors, even those that concern questions which are not
   answered yet. This mode is meant to use after the user tried to activate the questionnaire,
   but it still contained inconsistencies or errors. If one would
   use `VALIDATE` instead, errors for unanswered questions would be dropped.

200.description: Returns the updated riskprofile, including scoring and errors.

Last-Modified.description: The 'Last-Modified' header contains the last modification time for returned risk profile for the given page in RFC2616 format.  Example: Fri, 27 Sep 2019 11:00:00 GMT

400.description:
If the request body is invalid, contains only empty list of answers
or the given answers for the questionnaire are invalid.

404.description: The risk profile with the provided id was not found.

409.description: The risk profile with the provided id is not in status NEW!

412.description: The risk profile changed since the provided If-Unmodified-Since header

428.description: The If-Unmodified-Since header is missing, but is required

500.description: Internal Server Error with detailed error description

put.summary: Activates or archives a new risk profile
put.description:
If desired new status is ACTIVE it validates and activates the questionnaire for the given id if current status is NEW. Simultaneously an existing ACTIVE questionnaire will be set to state ARCHIVED.
If desired new status is ARCHIVED it validates and archive the questionnaire for the given id if current status is ACTIVE.
Accepted status transitions are NEW->ACTIVE and ACTIVE->ARCHIVED. All other leads to an error.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The locale of the language the resource should return for language selection (default: en)

parameters.name: If-Unmodified-Since
parameters.description:
The timestamp of the last know change to the entity, provided by the backend as Last-Modified 
header. The user of the endpoint indicates which version of the entity he is working with in order
for the system to be able to determine, whether the user has to update the entity prior to 
manipulating it.

200.description: Returns the active riskprofile, including scoring.

Last-Modified.description: The 'Last-Modified' header contains the last modification time for returned risk profile for the given page in RFC2616 format.  Example: Fri, 27 Sep 2019 11:00:00 GMT

400.description: If given status is unknown, request body can't be parsed (invalid json) or status transition is invalid (NEW->ARCHIVED, ACTIVE/ARCHIVED->NEW)

404.description: The risk profile with the provided id was not found.

412.description: The risk-profile changed since the provided If-Unmodified-Since header

428.description: The If-Unmodified-Since header is missing, but is required

500.description: Internal Server Error with detailed error description

get.description:
Redirects to the currently activated knowledge-and-experience questionnaire for this person.
If none exists, returns 404.

parameters.name: personId
parameters.description: The personId whose questionnaire is referenced.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The locale of the language the resource should return for language selection (default: en)

304.description: The knowledge-and-experience questionnaire did not change since the provided If-Modified-Since header

404.description: No active questionnaire exists for this person.

500.description: Internal Server Error with detailed error description

post.description:
Creates a new knowledge-and-experience questionnaire for a person. The questionnaire is not
activated and intended for filling in. For filling in and activation of this questionnair use its
provided location from the HAL self-link or from the HTTP Location header. Answers in the
questionnaire are already provided as far as possible, based on the currently activated
knowledge-and-experiences questionnaire.

parameters.name: personId
parameters.description: The personId whose questionnaire is referenced.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The locale of the language the resource should return for language selection (default: en)

parameters.name: createEmpty
parameters.description:
Controls creation mode.
- false: A NEW entity is created with answers copied from the ACTIVE set. If no ACTIVE set exist, then the answer is copied from the most recently ARCHIVED set.
- true (default): A NEW entity is created without any answers from ACTIVE or ARCHIVE set.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Tags used identify the correct questionnaire

Last-Modified.description: The 'Last-Modified' header contains the last modification time for returned knowledge-and-experience questionnaire for the given page in RFC2616 format.  Example: Fri, 27 Sep 2019 11:00:00 GMT

400.description: No questionnaire found for the provided set of tags.

500.description: Internal Server Error with detailed error description

get.description: Returns the knowledge and experience questionnaire by id.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The locale of the language the resource should return for language selection (default: en)

200.description: The knowledge and experience questionnaire was found.

304.description: The knowledge-and-experience questionnaire did not change since the provided If-Modified-Since header

404.description: No active questionnaire exists for this person.

500.description: Internal Server Error with detailed error description

put.description:
Updates the answers and justifications of the questionnaire. The action taken is based on the
validationMode parameter (if given).

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The locale of the language the resource should return for language selection (default: en)

parameters.name: If-Unmodified-Since
parameters.description:
The timestamp of the last know change to the entity, provided by the backend as Last-Modified 
header. The user of the endpoint indicates which version of the entity he is working with in order
for the system to be able to determine, whether the user has to update the entity prior to 
manipulating it.

parameters.name: validationMode
parameters.description:
What action to take in the API:
- `VALIDATE`: Update the questionnaire and validate the answers. Mark problems and
   inconsistencies with error messages in the response. Unanswered questions will not
   trigger errors. This mode is meant to be used for the initial answering of a questionnaire,
   before the user tries to activate it.
- `VALIDATE_FULL`: Update the questionnaire and validate the answers. All problems and
   inconsistencies will be reported as errors, even those that concern questions which are not
   answered yet. This mode is meant to use after the user tried to activate the questionnaire,
   but it still contained inconsistencies or errors. If one would
   use `VALIDATE` instead, errors for unanswered questions would be dropped.

Last-Modified.description: The 'Last-Modified' header contains the last modification time for returned knowledge-and-experience questionnaire for the given page in RFC2616 format.  Example: Fri, 27 Sep 2019 11:00:00 GMT

400.description:
If the request body is invalid, contains only empty list of answers
or the given answers for the questionnaire are invalid.

404.description: No active questionnaire exists for this person.

409.description:
If the questionnaire with given id is not in status NEW 
since only questionnaires in status NEW are allowed to be filled out (changed).

412.description: The questionnaire changed since the provided If-Unmodified-Since header

428.description: The If-Unmodified-Since header is missing, but is required

500.description: Internal Server Error with detailed error description

put.summary: Activate or archive a knowledge and experience questionnaire
put.description:
If desired new status is ACTIVE it validates and activates the questionnaire for the given id 
if current status is NEW. Simultaneously an existing ACTIVE questionnaire will be set to state ARCHIVED.
If desired new status is ARCHIVED it validates and archive the questionnaire for the given id 
if current status is ACTIVE.
Accepted status transitions are NEW->ACTIVE and ACTIVE->ARCHIVED. All other leads to an error.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The locale of the language the resource should return for language selection (default: en)

parameters.name: If-Unmodified-Since
parameters.description:
The timestamp of the last know change to the entity, provided by the backend as Last-Modified 
header. The user of the endpoint indicates which version of the entity he is working with in order
for the system to be able to determine, whether the user has to update the entity prior to 
manipulating it.

200.description:
Returns the updated knowledge and experience questionnaire
if status transition was valid (NEW->ACTIVE or ACTIVE->ARCHIVED)

Last-Modified.description: The 'Last-Modified' header contains the last modification time for returned knowledge-and-experience questionnaire for the given page in RFC2616 format.  Example: Fri, 27 Sep 2019 11:00:00 GMT

400.description:
If given status is unknown, request body can't be parsed (invalid json) 
or status transition is invalid (NEW->ARCHIVED, ACTIVE/ARCHIVED->NEW)

404.description: No questionnaire exists for given id.

412.description: The questionnaire changed since the provided If-Unmodified-Since header

428.description: The If-Unmodified-Since header is missing, but is required

500.description: Internal Server Error with detailed error description

get.summary: Retrieves the version information for this service.
get.description: Retrieves the version information for this service, including the artifact name and version, the Git commit hash and the link to the license resource.

200.description: The version information was found and is enclosed in the response.

get.summary: Retrieves the license information for this service.

200.description: The license information was found and is enclosed in the response.

get.summary: Retrieves the service's current health state.
get.description: Returns an HTTP response code indicating the service's current health state.

200.description: The service is up and running and can process requests.

503.description: The service is up and running but cannot process requests.

get.summary: Retrieves information on the service's current health state.
get.description: Returns a JSON document describing the service's current health status.

200.description: The request was processed, and the health state information can be found in the enclosed response.

status.description:
The current status of the questionnaire. Questionnaires in status NEW are editable, but not yet visible 
outside of the module, status ACTIVE makes the questionnaire immutable, but visible outside of the 
module. ACTIVE questionnaires are the ones that are served for a specific owner constellation and there
is always only one ACTIVE questionnaire per owner constellation. ARCHIVED questionnaire are also immutable
but can only be accessed directly via their specific id.

id.description: The unique id of the risk profile.

tenant.description: The tenant for which this risk profile was created.

lastModified.description:
The timestamp of the last modification of the risk profile. This is mostly used to create the 
Last-Modified header.

status.description:
The current status of the questionnaire. Questionnaires in status NEW are editable, but not yet visible 
outside of the module, status ACTIVE makes the questionnaire immutable, but visible outside of the 
module. ACTIVE questionnaires are the ones that are served for a specific owner constellation and there
is always only one ACTIVE questionnaire per owner constellation. ARCHIVED questionnaire are also immutable
but can only be accessed directly via their specific id.

questionGroups.description:
Groups of questions. the grouping is done as part of the questionnaire and solely serve the purpose of
structuring the questionnaire. Separate groups might be displayed individually, or specific groups might
require highlighting. 
The groups also have impact on the evaluation, since the questions of specific groups may have impact on
partial scores.

documentationTexts.description: Additional descriptive texts to give more information for context or implications

representativeRestrictions.description:
Restrictions for representatives that are allowed to work with associated contracts. These restrictions
are meant to limit the representatives to certain strategies, no matter what the representatives risk
profile might say.

An example for this could be a legal representative for a minor that is restricted to use only low-risk
strategies.

riskStrategyScore.description:
The calculated score for the risk strategy, based on the answers given and the details in the configured 
questionnaire and algorithm.

calculatedRiskStrategy.description:
The calculated value for the risk strategy, based on the answers given and the details in the configured 
questionnaire and algorithm.

riskStrategyResult.description:
The chosen value for the risk strategy. This defaults to the calculated risk strategy, but can be 
overridden by users choice.

riskStrategyDescriptionHtml.description: Descriptive text for the calculated result, explaining the implications of the results reached.

deviatedRiskStrategyDescriptionHtml.description: Descriptive text for the chosen result, explaining the implications of the results reached.

riskStrategyDeviationJustification.description: A justification provided, explaining the customers deviation of the calculated result.

previousRiskStrategyDeviationJustificati.description:
A previously provided justification, explaining the customers deviation of the calculated result. This
is used to keep the justification of an older version of the questionnaire, e.g. when creating a new
questionnaire, without immediately entering it.

riskAttitudeScore.description:
The calculated score for the risk attitude, based on the answers given and the details in the configured 
questionnaire and algorithm.

riskAttitudeResult.description:
The calculated value for the risk attitude, based on the answers given and the details in the configured 
questionnaire and algorithm.

riskCapabilityScore.description:
The calculated score for the risk capability, based on the answers given and the details in the configured 
questionnaire and algorithm.

riskCapabilityResult.description:
The calculated value for the risk capability, based on the answers given and the details in the configured 
questionnaire and algorithm.

id.description: Technical identifier of the additional documentation text.

textHtml.description: Additional documentation provided to the customer. This is configured in the backoffice tool.

id.description: The unique id of the knowledge and experience questionnaire.

status.description:
The current status of the questionnaire. Questionnaires in status NEW are editable, but not yet visible 
outside of the module, status ACTIVE makes the questionnaire immutable, but visible outside of the 
module. ACTIVE questionnaires are the ones that are served for a specific owner constellation and there
is always only one ACTIVE questionnaire per owner constellation. ARCHIVED questionnaire are also immutable
but can only be accessed directly via their specific id.

tenant.description: The tenant for which this knowledge and experience questionnaire was created.

lastModified.description:
The timestamp of the last modification of the knowledge and experience questionnaire. This is mostly 
used to create the Last-Modified header.

questionGroups.description:
Groups of questions. the grouping is done as part of the questionnaire and solely serve the purpose of
structuring the questionnaire. Separate groups might be displayed individually, or specific groups might
require highlighting.

id.description:
An id for this group of questions. Can be used in a frontend for presentation
purposes. I.e., displaying the questions in a certain group in a different way from
other groups.

title.description: A title for this group of questions if applicable. Can be

possibleAnswers.description: Contains all possible answers to this question.

errors.description:
If there is a consistency problem (or similar problem) with this question, a message
is recorded here to be displayed to the user.

justificationRequired.description:
In case of inconsistencies or errors that can be justified by the user, this value will
be set to `true`. The user then has to provide an `Answer` with a filled in
`justification` field to resolve this inconsistency.

currentJustification.description: If a justiciation was stored for this question, it is given here.

selectedAnswerId.description:
The `answerId` from the entry of `possibleAnswers` as chosen by the user. If
this field does not exist or is `null` the user did not chose an answer yet.

answerId.description: An identifier to use in `Answer`s. Unique for each question, but not necessarily globally.

name.description: The name of the answer to display to the user.

PossibleAnswer.description: A possible answer in a multiple choice question

errorCode.description: An id designating the kind of error

AnswerError.description: A error condition attached to a question.

personId.description: The id of the representative that is to be restricted.

maxRiskStrategy.description: The risk strategy the representative is restricted to.

Problem.description:
an RFC 7807 problem description.
The URIs shown here are may not be associated with content.

ownerIds.name: ownerId
ownerIds.description: Person ids of the owners that are to be represented by this client profile

createEmptyRisk.name: createEmpty
createEmptyRisk.description:
Controls creation mode.
- false: If a NEW entity exists it is returned. Otherwise a NEW entity is created with answers copied from the ACTIVE set. If no ACTIVE set exist, then the answer is copied from the most recently ARCHIVED set.
- true (default): If a NEW entity exists it is returned. Otherwise NEW entity is created without any answers from ACTIVE or ARCHIVE set.

createEmptyKnowledge.name: createEmpty
createEmptyKnowledge.description:
Controls creation mode.
- false: A NEW entity is created with answers copied from the ACTIVE set. If no ACTIVE set exist, then the answer is copied from the most recently ARCHIVED set.
- true (default): A NEW entity is created without any answers from ACTIVE or ARCHIVE set.

tags.name: tag
tags.description:
Tags used identify the correct risk profile questionnaire.
This parameter is mandatory if the questionnaire can not be determined from the activated risk profile.

tagsRequired.name: tag
tagsRequired.description: Tags used identify the correct questionnaire

personId.name: personId
personId.description: The personId whose questionnaire is referenced.

What action to take in the API:
- `VALIDATE`: Update the questionnaire and validate the answers. Mark problems and
   inconsistencies with error messages in the response. Unanswered questions will not
   trigger errors. This mode is meant to be used for the initial answering of a questionnaire,
   before the user tries to activate it.
- `VALIDATE_FULL`: Update the questionnaire and validate the answers. All problems and
   inconsistencies will be reported as errors, even those that concern questions which are not
   answered yet. This mode is meant to use after the user tried to activate the questionnaire,
   but it still contained inconsistencies or errors. If one would
   use `VALIDATE` instead, errors for unanswered questions would be dropped.

If-Unmodified-Since.name: If-Unmodified-Since
If-Unmodified-Since.description:
The timestamp of the last know change to the entity, provided by the backend as Last-Modified 
header. The user of the endpoint indicates which version of the entity he is working with in order

Accept-Language.description: The locale of the language the resource should return for language selection (default: en)
